_comment: Objective body evals for principal-dotnet-engineer against jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture (net8.0). Scoped to the Domain layer because the solution-wide build fails on a NuGet audit advisory (AutoMapper NU1903) unrelated to the task. Grading is objective: --verify-cmd 'dotnet test tests/Domain.UnitTests -c Debug' (builds Domain + runs its tests). Each run is seeded from --project-template.

evals.prompt: This is a .NET 8 Clean Architecture solution. Add support for a new colour 'Teal' with hex code "#008080" to the Colour value object at src/Domain/ValueObjects/Colour.cs, so that Colour.From("#008080") returns the colour instead of throwing UnsupportedColourException (note Colour validates against its SupportedColours list). Then add an NUnit test to tests/Domain.UnitTests/ValueObjects/ColourTests.cs — the project uses NUnit and FluentAssertions — asserting that Colour.From("#008080") succeeds and its Code equals "#008080". Run `dotnet test tests/Domain.UnitTests` and ensure it passes.

This is a .NET 8 Clean Architecture solution. Add support for a new colour 'Pink' with hex code "#FF69B4" to the Colour value object at src/Domain/ValueObjects/Colour.cs, so that Colour.From("#FF69B4") returns the colour instead of throwing UnsupportedColourException (Colour validates against its SupportedColours list). Add an NUnit test to tests/Domain.UnitTests/ValueObjects/ColourTests.cs (NUnit + FluentAssertions) asserting Colour.From("#FF69B4") succeeds and its Code equals "#FF69B4". Run `dotnet test tests/Domain.UnitTests` and ensure it passes.
